productDisplayName: Timberland Men Claremont Popl Pink Shirt
description: CompositionPink full sleeve shirt made of 100% organic cotton, with tape detailing on inseam of the collar, appliqued brand logo on the facing placket, patch pocket on left chest with black thread detailing and embroidered logo , full length button placket with embroidered logo on right sleeve, and curved hemlineFittingRegularWash care Machine wash in cold water at 30 degree C Wash separately before wearing for the first time Wash dark colours separately only non-chlorine bleach when needed Tumble dry normal Warm iron Dry cleanable Time to look like the classic rugged hero right out of a Hollywood movie! This pink shirt from timberland has been specially dyed to give it a weathered look, making it ideal for outdoor wear. Team it with well-fitting jeans and rugged boots to look like a young Indiana Jones!This shirt has been manufactured in an environment-friendly manner with the aim to reduce Carbon Footprint.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
